chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – The (Application of) the Henna after the Noura

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/414)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/414)
text: مَنِ اطَّلَى فَتَدَلَّكَ بِالْحِنَّاءِ مِنْ قَرْنِهِ إِلَى قَدَمِهِ نُفِيَ عَنْهُ الْفَقْرُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from one of our companions, raising it,
‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who waxes and massages with the henna from his head to his feet, the poverty is negated from him’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from certain persons of our people in a marfu ‘ manner has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one applies lime paste then rubs henna from his top to his toes, his poverty goes away.’”
